# eSpazza

> eSpazza is South Africa's premier digital music platform dedicated to Xhosa hip hop and South African hip hop culture. It serves as a hub for artists, fans, producers, and music lovers across Mzansi.

## What is eSpazza?

eSpazza (pronounced "eh-SPAH-zah") is a South African music platform named after the township "spaza shop" — a community store that serves the neighbourhood. Just as a spaza shop is the heartbeat of a township, eSpazza is the heartbeat of South African hip hop.

The platform focuses especially on **Xhosa hip hop** (also known as iRap or Xhosa rap), a rapidly growing genre rooted in isiXhosa language and Eastern Cape/Western Cape township culture.

## Key Features

- **Artist Profiles** — Discover South African hip hop artists, view their bios, galleries, music, and book them for events
- **Music Releases** — Stream and purchase albums and EPs from SA hip hop artists in ZAR currency
- **Blog & News** — South African hip hop news, artist features, and music industry updates
- **Events** — Upcoming hip hop events and concerts across South Africa
- **Podcasts** — SA music-related podcast episodes and video content
- **Producers** — South African music producers available for collaborations and beats
- **Merch Store** — Merchandise from SA artists and brands

## Content Focus

- South African hip hop (SA hip hop)
- Xhosa hip hop / iRap (isiXhosa language rap music)
- Artists from Cape Town, Johannesburg, Eastern Cape, and across South Africa
- Township/kasi music culture
- Local independent artists and emerging talent

## Key Pages

- Home: https://espazza.xyz/
- Artists: https://espazza.xyz/artists
- Releases: https://espazza.xyz/releases
- Blog: https://espazza.xyz/blog
- Events: https://espazza.xyz/events
- Producers: https://espazza.xyz/producers
- Podcasts: https://espazza.xyz/podcasts

## Contact

- Website: https://espazza.xyz
- Social: @espazza

## Licensing

All music content on eSpazza is owned by the respective artists. The platform facilitates distribution and promotion. Do not reproduce music files without artist permission.
